ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chatbots" (
  "chatbot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chatbot */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the chatbot */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief description of the chatbot's purpose */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the chatbot was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the chatbot was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the chatbot */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the chatbot (e.g., active, inactive, under_review) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the chatbot's image or avatar */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant keywords or categories associated with the chatbot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chatbot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chatbots_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user's account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chatbot_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "chatbot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chatbot this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the chatbot */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made in this version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when this version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chatbot_versions_chatbot_id FOREIGN KEY ("chatbot_id") REFERENCES chatbots ("chatbot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "chatbot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chatbot associated with these analytics */,
  "user_engagement" REAL /* Percentage of user engagement with the chatbot */,
  "response_accuracy" REAL /* Percentage of accurate responses from the chatbot */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the chatbot was used */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for which the analytics data is recorded (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "engagement_metric" TEXT /* Specific engagement metric used (e.g., time spent, messages sent) */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the analytics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_chatbot_id FOREIGN KEY ("chatbot_id") REFERENCES chatbots ("chatbot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "chatbot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chatbot the feedback is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Feedback comments provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user, usually from 1 to 5 */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., bug_report, feature_request, general_comment) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the feedback was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_chatbot_id FOREIGN KEY ("chatbot_id") REFERENCES chatbots ("chatbot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the admin role */,
  "admin_level" TEXT /* Level of the admin (e.g., super, moderator) */,
  "admin_email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the admin account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "chatbot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chatbot the collaborator is working on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is collaborating */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., developer, designer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the collaborator (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the collaborator joined the chatbot project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_chatbot_id FOREIGN KEY ("chatbot_id") REFERENCES chatbots ("chatbot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permissions */,
  "chatbot_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the chatbot (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "version_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the chatbot version (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
